mapper.select: SELECT * FROM projects ORDER BY event_date DESC;

SELECT * FROM projects
AND event_date >= CONCAT(#{fiscalYear}, '-04-01') AND event_date < CONCAT(#{fiscalYear} + 1, '-04-01')
AND budget_type_id = #{budgetTypeId}
ORDER BY event_date DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects (name, budget_type_id, target_category, event_date, location_venue, location_accommodation, schedule_content, project_outcome) VALUES (#{name}, #{budgetTypeId}, #{targetCategory}, #{eventDate}, #{locationVenue}, #{locationAccommodation}, #{scheduleContent}, #{projectOutcome})
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET name = #{name}, budget_type_id = #{budgetTypeId}, target_category = #{targetCategory}, event_date = #{eventDate}, location_venue = #{locationVenue}, location_accommodation = #{locationAccommodation}, schedule_content = #{scheduleContent}, project_outcome = #{projectOutcome} WHERE id = #{id}
